subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that for several days they came here and dwelt at this blessed Threshold, associating with thee in the utmost fellowship and love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله ایامی چند آمدند در اینجا در آستان  مبارک بودند و در کمال محبت معاشرت کردید
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @presence of; reunion with God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
